# **\--Distance Cost Tier--**

* # **Tier I (Cheap Goods)**

  * Natural Resources  
  * Paper/Vellum

* # **Tier II (Common Goods)**

  * Expensive Mineral Resources  
    * Nari Stones  
    * Sapphire  
    * Aquamarine  
    * Amethyst  
  * Black Honey  
  * Sigil Rings  
  * Armor & Weapons of lower quality  
  * Inks/Dyes

* # **Tier III (Expensive Goods)**

  * Rare Mineral resources  
    * Gold  
    * Titanium  
  * Armor & Weapons of higher quality

* # **Tier IV (Nobility Goods)**

  * Custom Armor & Weapons.  
  * Household items, or any items of extremely high craft/quality.

# 

# **\--Natural Resources--**

# **Fost Stone**

* **Isekai History**  
  * A stone found in the sediment of the Buhraies lake, Buhraies Plains, and throughout Waterfall city up to Sanbi Kingdom.   
  * Closer to the ocean, the bottom of the river lights up with rocks that get too close to salt water.  
  * Fauna, especially beasts, seem to avoid places containing it when it is submerged in water.  
* **Usage**  
  * Lightsource. Requires water & salt to work.  
  * Keep monsters at bay.  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * ![][image1]![][image2]

# **Walking Heart**

* **Isekai History**  
  * See Walking Heart Interface  
* **Usage**  
  * Turns into undead.  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * ![][image3]

# 

# 

# **Bone Wood**

* **Isekai History**  
  * A mixture of Bone, iron, Grounded Nari, and Greenbread fruit core.  
  * Is less flexible than most wood, but it lasts much longer.   
  * Can be made to be more flexible for armor/weapons when mixed with other items.  
* **Usage**  
  * Construction/Furniture  
  * Armor   
  * Weapons  
* **Visual Reference**

![][image4]\*Slightly grainier. ![][image5]

# 

# **Wood & Wood People Wood**

* **Isekai History**  
  * See Beasts \> Wood People  
* **Usage**  
  * Construction/Furniture/Armor & Weapon decoration  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * See Beasts \> Wood People

# 

# **Soul Wood**

* **Isekai History**  
  * See Flora  
* **Usage**  
  * See Flora  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * See Flora

# 

# **Black Wood**

* **Isekai History**  
  * See Flora  
* **Usage**  
  * See Flora  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * See Flora

# **Winga Dust**

* **Isekai History**  
  * See Fauna \> Winga  
  * Used to make the tool to “cut through anything” because Winga dust makes it as hard as diamond. Usually, a coating is placed on it, then replaced every few years.  
* **Usage**  
  * Weapons  
  * Tools  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * **![][image6]**

# 

# 

# 

# **\--Weapons--**

## See Economy Calculator for more information.

# **Fernan’s Bow**

* **Isekai History**  
  * A custom-made weapon using chitin and finely crafted bonewood \+ Winga beak/claws for CQC.  
* **Usage**  
  * Like a bow, but also as a weapon for CQC if necessary.  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * See Fernam clip.

# **\--Armor--**

## See Economy Calculator for more information.

# **Morika’s Armor**

* **Isekai History**  
  * A special Chitin armor designed after Sweet Sting.  
* **Usage**  
  * CQC, Impaling.  
* **Visual Reference**  
  * See Character.

# 

# 

# **\--Household--**

# **Soul Energy Related**

| Item | Isekai History | Cost/Item |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| **Sigil Rings** | **Soul Wood Black Wood** | See Economy Calculator |
| **Fost Lamp** ![][image7] ![][image8] | A fost stone about the size of a fist encased in glass and wood with an opening on top. They glow brighter than a candle when in contact with saltwater. The fist-sized stone lasts a year or so when used primarily at night. | \~20 Pearls/simple one |

# 

# 

# **Bathroom Related**

| Item | Isekai History | Cost/Item |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| **Tibou Soap** | **Tibou plant** Alongside animal fat and other ingredients. | \~5 Pearls |
| **Bagarisa Fur Toothbrush** | **Bagarisa/Wood** | \~12 Pearls |
| **Toothpaste** | **Flora mixed with salt, and alcohol** Some mix with wine, etc. | \~9 Pearls |
| **Water system Pull-gate Handle ![][image9]** | **Usually made out of metals like iron that can withstand the pressure of the water.** | \~20 Pearls \+ Tubing |

# 

# **Writing Related**

| Item | Isekai History | Cost/Item |
| :---: | :---: | :---: |
| **Winga Writing Feather** | **Winga** | \~2 Pearls |
| **Writing Stick (Made of charcoal, possibly enveloped by wood for fanciness. See Kiko) ![][image10]** | **Piece of Charcoal Charcoal Stick Charcoal Refined Stick** | 0\~2 Pearls \~7 Pearls \~30 Pearls |
| **Paper  (bundle of \~10 loose pages)** | **Tree** | \~1 Pearl |
| **Wood People Paper** | **Wood People** | \~2 Pearls |
| **6x9 Simple Journal (50 pages)** | **Paper, Leather, Glue** | \~35 Pearls |
| **Seal Stamp** | **Wood Bone Wood Chitin Iron Steel Gold** | \~10 Pearls \~20 Pearls \~40 Pearls \~85 Pearls \~2 Amethyst \~4 Aquamarine |
| **Seal Wax** | **Sweet Sting Wax/Ink dye** | \~20\~40 Pearls/Bottle |

# 

# 

# **Inks/Dyes**

| Color | Isekai History | Cost/Bottle |
| :---: | :---: | :---: |
| **Black** | **Trees** | \~5 Pearls |
| **Red** | **Flowers** | \~11 Pearls |
| **Pink** | **Wood People Sap** | \~15 Pearls |
| **White** | **Corals (Cruroland)** | \~10 Pearls |
| **Blue** | **Lapis Lazuli** Just like Amethyst mining | \~28 Pearls |
| **Yellow** | **Flowers** | \~11 Pearls |

# 

# **Kitchen/Dining Table**

| Item | Isekai History | Cost/Item |
| ----- | :---: | ----- |
| **Ice Preserver (fridge-freezer)** | **Wood/Clay Iron/Wood/Clay** | \~1 Amethyst \~1 Aquamarine |
| **Picker** It is common for each person to have their own Picker, and take it with them. Some decorate to make it unique as well. | **Wood Bone Wood Chitin Iron Steel Gold** | \~5 Pearls \~10 Pearls \~17 Pearls \~25 Pearls \~1 Amethyst \~1 Aquamarine |
| **Beer Mug** Getting drunk requires the proper tools. | **Wood Bone Wood Chitin Iron Steel Gold** | \~15 Pearls \~20 Pearls \~28 Pearls \~35 Pearls \~3 Amethyst \~5 Aquamarine |
| **Wine/Mead Mug** Gotta be fancy | **Wood Bone Wood Chitin Iron Steel Gold** | \~13 Pearls \~16 Pearls \~23 Pearls \~29 Pearls \~2 Amethyst \~3 Aquamarine |
| **Bread Plate/Bow** Soak up the contents of your food. Given to the poor afterwards. ![][image11] | **Bread** | \~0\~2 Pearls ![][image12] |
